headline: Teleflex Appoints Jason Weidman as President and CEO
summary: WAYNE, Pa., April 30, 2026--Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE: TFX) today announced that Jason Weidman has been appointed President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 8, 2026. He will succeed Stuart Randle, who has been serving as Interim President and CEO since January 2026 and will continue as a member of Teleflex’s Board of Directors. Mr. Weidman is expected to join the Teleflex Board when he assumes his role as President and CEO.

raw.headline: Teleflex Appoints Jason Weidman as President and CEO
raw.summary: WAYNE, Pa., April 30, 2026--Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE: TFX) today announced that Jason Weidman has been appointed President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 8, 2026. He will succeed Stuart Randle, who has been serving as Interim President and CEO since January 2026 and will continue as a member of Teleflex’s Board of Directors. Mr. Weidman is expected to join the Teleflex Board when he assumes his role as President and CEO.

headline: Affera Breakthrough: FDA Nod For Sphere-9 Could Be A Game Changer For Medtronic (MDT)
summary: In late April 2026, Medtronic reported continued progress for its Affera cardiac arrhythmia platform, including encouraging early feasibility data for ventricular tachycardia, new atrial fibrillation trials, FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for the Sphere-9 catheter, and CE Mark for the Sphere-360 catheter in Europe. These developments highlight Medtronic's effort to expand its pulsed field and radiofrequency ablation portfolio into more complex arrhythmias and anatomies, potentially...
